description_long: This is a large, classical-style amphora vase with a dark, weathered patina, featuring two robust handles on either side. The body is adorned with intricate relief carvings, including a Greek key border near the rim and a detailed scene of ancient warriors in combat, reminiscent of ancient Greek pottery. On the reverse, there is an inscription in Greek script above a stylized floral motif, adding to its historical authenticity. The vase stands on a rounded pedestal base, providing stability and an elegant profile. The surface appears to be made of aged bronze or patinated metal, giving it a greenish-blue hue with darker accents in the recesses. This decorative piece would be a striking focal point in a public park, plaza, or as an ornamental feature in an urban garden.
description: A large, patinated bronze amphora vase with Greek warrior reliefs, dual handles, and an inscribed back. Its weathered green-blue finish and classical motifs evoke ancient Greek artistry.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed relief of Greek warriors and the prominent Greek key border near the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlights one of the sturdy handles and the vase's rounded profile, with less visible decoration.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the Greek inscription and a stylized floral motif beneath it, framed by the two handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the other handle and the vase's smooth, curved surface with minimal decoration.
attribute_pattern: ancient Greek warrior scene and geometric border
